label: Jan 16, 2025
headline: India successfully tests Agni-V with MIRV technology
summary: India's DRDO successfully flight-tested the Agni-V ballistic missile fitted with Multiple Independently targetable Re-entry Vehicle (MIRV) technology under Mission Divyastra. The test demonstrates India's capability to deliver multiple nuclear warheads to different targets from a single missile, significantly enhancing strategic deterrence.
gd_angle: This development is significant for India's nuclear doctrine of 'No First Use' — it strengthens credible minimum deterrence without signalling aggression. In a GD, you can argue it shifts the regional strategic balance and what India's obligations are under existing arms control frameworks.
